description:
Converts vector from model to world space in render time scope.
{{Feature|important|For [[setObjectScale|scaled objects]], the resulting vector's [[vectorMagnitude|magnitude]] will also be [[vectorMultiply|multiplied]] by the object scale.}}
examples:
Convert model space vector [0,-10,4] to world space; vector gets rotated according to _airplane: 
<sqf>_airplane vectorModelToWorldVisual [0,-10,4];</sqf>
name: vectorModelToWorldVisual

ret.desc: vector direction in world space in format [x,y,z]

Item.desc: vector direction in model space in format [x,y,z]
Item.name: modelDir
